knowledge.html:
I. DANH TU (NOUN) - Vi tri trong cau

Vi triVi du
1. Chu ngu cua cauMaths is the subject I like best
2. Sau tinh tu (good, beautiful...)
Sau tinh tu so huu (my, your, his, her...)
Cum danh tu: a/an the + (adv) + adj + N		She is a good teacher.
His father works in hospital.
3. Lam tan ngu, sau dong tuI like English.
We are students.
4. Sau "enough" (enough + N)He didn't have enough money to buy that car.
5. Sau cac mao tu (a, an, the)
Sau dai tu chi dinh (this, that, these, those)
Sau luong tu (each, no, any, a few, a little...)		She is a teacher.
This book is an interesting book.
I have a little money to go to the movie.
6. Sau gioi tu: in, on, of, with, under, at...Thanh is good at literature.
Dau hieu nhan biet danh tu:
-ion (distribution), -ment (development), -er (teacher), -or (actor), -ant (accountant), -age (marriage), -ship (friendship), -sm (enthusiasm), -ity (ability), -ness (happiness), -dom (freedom), -ist (terrorist), -ian (physician), -hood (childhood), -ance (importance), -ence (dependence), -ety (society), -ty (honesty)

II. TINH TU (ADJECTIVE) - Vi tri trong cau

Vi triVi du
1. Truoc danh tu: (a/an/the) + (adv) + adj + NMy Tam is a famous singer.
2. Sau dong tu lien ket: be/seem/appear/feel/taste/look/keep/get/keep/make (sb) + adjTom seems tired now.
The homework keeps me busy all the time.
3. Sau "too": S + be/seem/look... + too + adjCoffee seems too hot for me to drink.
4. Truoc "enough": S + be + adj + enoughShe is tall enough to play volleyball.
5. Trong cau truc: so + adj + thatThe weather was so bad that we decided to stay at home.
6. Dung duoi cac dang so sanhMeat is more expensive than fish.
Dau hieu nhan biet tinh tu:
-ful (helpful), -less (homeless), -ly (friendly), -al (national), -ble (acceptable), -ive (active), -ous (famous), -ish (selfish), -y (foggy), -like (childlike), -ic (scientific), -ed (bored), -ing (interesting), -ary (necessary), -ant (important), -ent (different)

III. TRANG TU (ADVERB) - Vi tri trong cau

Vi triVi du
1. Truoc dong tu thuong va giua tro dong tu va dong tu thuong (dac biet la cac trang tu chi tan suat: always, usually...)They seldom get up early in the morning.
I have recently finished my homework.
I don't usually go to school late.
2. Truoc tinh tu: be/feel/look... + adv + adjShe is very nice.
He looks extremely unwell.
3. Sau "too": V(thuong) + too + adv!The teacher speaks too quickly.
4. Truoc "enough": V(thuong) + adv + enoughThe teacher speaks slowly enough for us to understand.
5. Trong cau truc: V(thuong) + so + adv + thatJack drove so fast that he caused an accident.
6. Dung cuoi cau (trang tu thoi gian)I finished my essay last week.
7. Thuong dung o dau cau/giua cau va cach cac thanh phan khac cua cau bang dau ","Last summer I came back my home country.
It's raining hard. Tom, however, goes to school.
Dau hieu nhan biet trang tu:
Adv = adj + -ly (beautifully, usefully, carefully, strongly, badly)

Ngoai le: Mot so tu co duoi "-ly" nhung la tinh tu, khong phai trang tu: daily, early, elderly, friendly, likely, lively, lonely, lovely, manly, monthly, silly, ugly, unlikely, weekly, yearly

IV. DONG TU (VERB) - Vi tri trong cau

Vi triVi du
1. Thuong dung sau chu nguLam Anh plays volleyball everyday.
2. Dung sau trang tu chi tan suatI usually get up late.
Dau hieu nhan biet dong tu:
-ate (compensate), -ain (maintain), -flect (reflect), -flict (inflict), -spect (respect), -scrib (describe), -ceive (deceive), -fy (modify), -ise/-ize (realize), -ude (include), -ide (divide), -dus (evade), -tend (extend)

exercises.question: The government should take some measures to protect _______ species.
exercises.explanation: Can mot tinh tu truoc danh tu 'species'. 'Endangered' (bi de doa) la tinh tu dung nghia.

exercises.question: Turtles and tortoises are known to be threatened with _______.
exercises.explanation: Sau gioi tu 'with' can danh tu. 'Extinction' la danh tu (su tuyet chung).

exercises.question: They are going to _______ the pool to 2 meters.
exercises.explanation: Sau 'going to' can dong tu nguyen mau. 'Deepen' = lam sau hon.

exercises.question: We were awarded a _______.
exercises.explanation: Sau mao tu 'a' can danh tu. 'Penalty' = hinh phat, la danh tu phu hop nhat.

exercises.question: Choosing a career is one of the most important _______ you will make in life.
exercises.explanation: Can danh tu lam tan ngu. 'Decisions' (quyet dinh) la danh tu so nhieu phu hop.

exercises.question: All of the students appreciate the _______ of English learning.
exercises.explanation: Sau mao tu 'the' can danh tu. 'Importance' (su quan trong) la danh tu.

exercises.question: We can enjoy live programmes through _______ satellites.
exercises.explanation: Truoc danh tu 'satellites' can tinh tu hoac danh tu bo nghia. 'Communication satellites' = ve tinh truyen thong.

exercises.question: Computers are _______ used in schools and universities.
exercises.explanation: Can trang tu bo nghia cho dong tu 'used'. 'Widely' = mot cach rong rai.

exercises.question: She has made an _______ for the job as a nursery teacher because she likes children.
exercises.explanation: Sau 'an' can danh tu. 'Make an application' = nop don ung tuyen.

exercises.question: Daisy has been out of work for 3 months. She stays at home and does the housework_______.
exercises.explanation: Can trang tu bo nghia cho dong tu 'does'. 'Disappointedly' = mot cach that vong.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
To prepare his science works, Faraday often spent whole days in the laboratory.
(A) prepare (B) science (C) spent (D) laboratory
exercises.explanation: 'Science' la danh tu, nhung o day can tinh tu bo nghia cho danh tu 'works'. Phai sua thanh 'scientific'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
They ride their bicycle to the countryside for please.
(A) their (B) to (C) for (D) please
exercises.explanation: Sau gioi tu 'for' can danh tu. 'Please' la dong tu, phai sua thanh 'pleasure' (niem vui).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
He was sadness because he couldn't pay his debts.
(A) sadness (B) because (C) pay (D) debts
exercises.explanation: Sau 'was' (dong tu lien ket) can tinh tu. 'Sadness' la danh tu, phai sua thanh 'sad'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
The representatives joining the festival were from different national.
(A) representatives (B) joining (C) were (D) national
exercises.explanation: Sau tinh tu 'different' can danh tu. 'National' la tinh tu, phai sua thanh 'nations' (quoc gia).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
The teacher often courage the students to ask questions.
(A) teacher (B) courage (C) to ask (D) questions
exercises.explanation: 'Courage' la danh tu (su dung cam). O day can dong tu = 'encourages' (khuyen khich).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
In some countries, black people do not have equal with white people.
(A) countries (B) black (C) equal (D) white
exercises.explanation: 'Equal' la tinh tu, nhung sau 'have' can danh tu. Phai sua thanh 'equality' (su binh dang).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
Many industry developed countries spend much money preventing environmental pollution.
(A) industry (B) spend (C) much (D) environmental
exercises.explanation: 'Industry' la danh tu. Truoc danh tu 'developed countries' can tinh tu. Sua thanh 'industrially' hoac 'industrial'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
When foreigners ask him, he answers in English automatic.
(A) When (B) foreigners (C) answers (D) automatic
exercises.explanation: Can trang tu bo nghia cho dong tu 'answers'. 'Automatic' la tinh tu, phai sua thanh 'automatically'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
Special drugs should be manufacture and dispensed carefully.
(A) Special (B) drugs (C) manufacture (D) carefully
exercises.explanation: Sau 'should be' can qua khu phan tu (bi dong). 'Manufacture' la dong tu nguyen mau, phai sua thanh 'manufactured'.

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
He often went to work late, consequence he was sacked.
(A) went (B) to work (C) consequence (D) sacked
exercises.explanation: 'Consequence' la danh tu. O day can trang tu lien ket = 'consequently' (do do, vi vay).

exercises.question:
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to show the underlined part that needs correction:
We should learn all the new words by heart in order to rich our vocabulary.
(A) learn (B) by heart (C) rich (D) vocabulary
exercises.explanation: Sau 'to' (in order to) can dong tu nguyen mau. 'Rich' la tinh tu, phai sua thanh 'enrich' (lam giau).
